title: ARCHIVED – Settlement Program and Resettlement Assistance Program: Call for Proposals (CFP) 2024 - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED – Settlement Program and Resettlement Assistance Program: Call for Proposals (CFP) 2024

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This national Call for Proposals 2024 funding process will make funding available to settlement and resettlement service providers via a number of funding opportunities.
Funding for this CFP 2024 process starts on April 1, 2025 .
- Projects may be eligible to receive funding for up to five years, ending March 31, 2030 .
- Applicants can apply for more than one funding opportunity by submitting funding applications in the Grants and Contributions System (GCS).
- The funding application period starts on November 14, 2023 and closes on January 31, 2024 (5 pm EST).

## Getting started – key steps for CFP 2024 funding applicants

### 1. Learn about the call for proposals process and what is new for CFP 2024
- Introduction and overview - CFP 2024

### 2. Explore the funding opportunities that are of interest to you
- How to use the funding guidelines
- Consult the funding opportunities list and guidelines

### 3. Sign up for one of our webinars
- 3 types of sessions available

### 4. Apply online via the Grants and Contributions System (GCS) Partner Portal
- Resources to help you with your application
- Frequently asked questions
